valuationMethod: URA valuation-guide friendly workflow with seed valuation tables and manual override; no runtime scraping.

ageRules.message: This pack warns on older vehicles and expects current URA valuation guide data for precise official values.

steeringRules.message: Uganda drives on the left; right-hand-drive vehicles are the normal fit for the local market.

inspectionRules.label: URA / standards checks
inspectionRules.message: Actual URA assessment can use official valuation-guide data rather than invoice price alone.

ports.label: Via Dar es Salaam to Kampala

sourceNotes.name: URA motor vehicle import tax calculator
sourceNotes.note: Used for calculator architecture reference; this product avoids runtime scraping.

sourceNotes.name: URA Motor Vehicle Valuation Guide Jan 2024
sourceNotes.note: Seed/update path expects valuation tables from official guide exports.

disclaimers: If the precise URA valuation is unavailable, the result is labelled as an estimate based on the current valuation pack.
Use updated URA valuation tables rather than relying on real-time government-site scraping.

faqs.question: Can Uganda estimate without a customs value?
faqs.answer: Yes. Use make, model, and year. The calculator tries the valuation seed pack and labels the result clearly when a precise official URA value is unavailable.

faqs.question: How are Uganda values updated?
faqs.answer: The valuation rows are refreshed from official URA guide data, previewed for calculation accuracy, then published through the configured data workflow.

copy.intro: Estimate a Uganda vehicle import using URA-style valuation data, exchange-rate-aware taxes, clearing costs, inland transport to Kampala or regional cities, and registration.
copy.hiddenCosts: The biggest misses are valuation-guide differences, inland movement from Mombasa or Dar, environmental levy on older vehicles, storage, and FX timing.
